name: opentable-mcp
description: OpenTable reservation management for Claude — list reservations, profile, saved restaurants. Fetches SSR pages via a TLS-spoofed HTTP client and parses __INITIAL_STATE__. Auth is session-cookie based (paste in cookies exported from a logged-in Chrome tab).

opentable_cookies.title: OpenTable Session Cookies
opentable_cookies.description: The full document.cookie string from a logged-in opentable.com tab. Open DevTools → Console and run `copy(document.cookie)`, then paste here. Must include the Akamai cookies (_abck, bm_sz, bm_so) plus the OpenTable auth cookies (authCke, ha_userSession). Refresh every few hours as these expire.

tools.name: opentable_list_reservations
tools.description: List the user's OpenTable reservations (upcoming / past / all)

tools.name: opentable_get_profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's profile (name, email, loyalty points, metro)

tools.name: opentable_search_restaurants
tools.description: Search OpenTable restaurants by term / location / date / party size

tools.name: opentable_get_restaurant
tools.description: Get full details for a single restaurant by id or slug
